objective.jobToBeDone: Visualizar a fila de pedidos da cozinha em ordem de prioridade e avançar cada pedido de 'recebido' para 'em preparo' e de 'em preparo' para 'pronto' com o mínimo de interações.
objective.primaryDecision: Qual pedido avançar para a próxima etapa do preparo (iniciar preparo ou marcar como pronto)
objective.usageFrequency: continuous/hands-busy — operational kitchen screen during active service

criticalActions.presentation: auto-loaded query displayed as prioritized queue (summary-first)
contextual-transition-actions / inline-row-command — one button per allowed next state on each row

informationHierarchy: 1. Queue of orders sorted by priority then receivedAt (most urgent/oldest first)
2. Per-order identity: priority indicator, status, orderType, tableNumber
3. Timing context: receivedAt and inPreparationAt for aging awareness
5. Contextual transition buttons per row (Iniciar Preparo / Marcar Pronto)
objective.successCriteria: Cook sees the full queue at a glance, identifies the next order by priority and arrival time, and advances its status with a single tap — no forms, no typed ids, no free status selects.
antiPatterns: separate transition form below the list
free status <select> over all enum values
multi-step wizard for a single-decision transition
